大发聊关室计划群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238904643_62723833<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63304196<br>vk.com/topic-238829365_62407961<br>vk.com/topic-238909180_63610442<br>vk.com/topic-238829378_62991252<br>vk.com/topic-238909198_62991277<br>vk.com/topic-238905447_63940726<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63940721<br>vk.com/topic-238909174_62493362<br>vk.com/topic-238865024_62493366<br>vk.com/topic-238909183_62724158<br>vk.com/topic-238909177_63940756<br>vk.com/topic-238909181_64155069<br>vk.com/topic-238909185_62408224<br>vk.com/topic-238909253_62724265<br>vk.com/topic-238909173_62724277<br>vk.com/topic-238909176_62851654<br>vk.com/topic-238904138_62991552<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63304662<br>vk.com/topic-238868936_62851715<br>vk.com/topic-238909206_62851734<br>vk.com/topic-238909928_62991653<br>vk.com/topic-238909180_63610945<br>vk.com/topic-238909198_62991785<br>vk.com/topic-238909207_63941109<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63941207<br>vk.com/topic-238909189_63304916<br>vk.com/topic-238909174_62493906<br>vk.com/topic-238909183_62724682<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63099946<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63099959<br>vk.com/topic-238909181_64155618<br>vk.com/topic-238831094_62494023<br>vk.com/topi
